task_completion.description: Open a chart for the instrument MSFT.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window is visible with 'MSFT' displayed in the window title, tab, or chart background watermark.

task_completion.description: Configure the chart type to Line Break with a value of 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Data Series' configuration window shows 'Line Break' selected as the chart type with a value of 3, OR the chart visually displays Line Break blocks (solid blocks without standard high/low wicks) with a label indicating Line Break (3).

task_completion.description: Add a Stochastic oscillator with Period K: 14, Period D: 3, and Smooth: 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Indicators' configuration window shows 'Stochastics' added with parameters 14, 3, 3, OR there is a sub-panel below the main chart displaying the Stochastic indicator with labels indicating (14, 3, 3).

task_completion.description: Add an ADX indicator with Period 14.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Indicators' configuration window shows 'ADX' added with a period of 14, OR there is a sub-panel below the main chart displaying the ADX indicator with a label indicating (14).

The 'Workspaces' menu shows the current workspace name without an asterisk (indicating it is saved), a 'Save Workspace' dialog is successfully submitted, or a notification confirms the workspace was saved.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual trading platform GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the trading platform's menus (e.g., New -> Chart, Indicators, Data Series) rather than using terminal commands or editing XML workspace files directly.

integrity.description: Indicators and chart types were genuinely applied to the chart.
integrity.visual_evidence: The indicators and chart styles are visible on the actual chart interface, not just typed into a text editor, search bar, or floating note.

integrity.description: The workspace was saved using the application's built-in functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the platform's 'Workspaces -> Save' menu or shortcut, rather than manually creating a dummy file in the C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: MSFT is the valid ticker for Microsoft Corporation. The task requires configuring a NinjaTrader 8 chart. Line Break is a standard chart type; a value of 3 means a reversal requires breaking 3 prior lines. The Stochastic Oscillator must have Period K=14, Period D=3, and Smooth=3. The ADX indicator must have Period=14. Workspaces in NinjaTrader 8 are typically saved via the Control Center's 'Workspaces' menu, and the default directory is C:\Users\<username>\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces.
